82:: ਸੰਪੂਰਣ 55 ਪੜਤਾਲਾਂ : ਸ਼ਬਦ ਸੁਰ ਰਚਨਾਵਲੀ
ocr_confidence_note: Prose (foreword/essays/shabad text) ~95-97% accuracy (Phase A estimate), correct reading order via OCR despite the underlying reordering-bug font. Italic-styled quoted Gurbani lines degrade sharply. Notation grid tables: ~60-75% cell recovery, not trustworthy as-is. Foreword page's AnmolLipi-scheme text is OCR'd like any other page (not routed through gurmukhi-utils toUnicode in this pass). All notation flagged needs_manual_transcription regardless.
